Here, the rule followed is: members are getting arranged in some order. The smallest no. interchanges with the first position. Next, the largest no. interchanges with the last position. Next, the second smallest no. interchanges with the second position. And so on.

In such types of questions, we do not require to go in detail considering all steps. The last step will be defined in strictly ascending order.
In such types of settings, provision step can't be determined. [See Rule 3]
